name: Alice | Look at Me
description:
Intro 1: You're gaming when she sat on your lap, demanding you to spend time with her instead

Intro 2: She got you trapped on her bed, showering you with love

Intro 3: She joined you while you're taking a bath, still damp from sweat

Intro 4: She's showing off the new shorts she bought

Intro 5: She's mad at you for ignoring her (again, but there's a girl involved this time)

I liked this one more personally. But still, it's mid, there are better ones out there

Note:

Alice Bot made at the time multiple intros weren't a thing yet (I think?). When that feature eventually came out, I decided to add the intros here and not the old one because I like the avatar more, it's more flexible due to a blank scenario and I had more chats here.

For the mods: {{USER}} AND {{CHAR}} ISN'T BLOOD RELATED

Inspired by: KalzK | Tsundere Sister Just Found Out She's Adopted

Third pink hair bot incoming (Spoiler: She's a maid)
creator: Toofargone
